step.name: audit-current
step.action: Read current PR template + branch protection + metrics state.

step.name: draft-templates
step.action: Customise PR template + four scenario templates from baseline.

step.name: draft-protection
step.action: Generate branch protection JSON: ≥1 reviewer, CI required, no force-push.

step.name: draft-metrics
step.action: Spec the three metrics queries + dashboard.
step.decision-gate: If metrics source not available, defer with note and proceed with templates + protection only.

step.name: land-bundle
step.action: Open one PR with template files + protection config + metrics spec.
